summary: Tested Service Desk mobile responsiveness on iPhone 14 Pro viewport (390x844). Core mobile features working: bottom navigation, sidebar toggle, ticket detail view, back button, modals. Found one design issue with filter panel not being hidden on mobile.

issues: Filter panel (w-52, 208px) is not hidden on mobile, causing cramped layout with both filter panel and ticket list showing side by side on 390px screen. The filter panel should be hidden on mobile and accessible via a filter button or integrated into the sidebar menu.
design_issues.location: DoggyServiceDesk.jsx line 3327 - Filter panel div has fixed width w-52 without mobile hiding

action_items: Consider hiding the filter panel on mobile (add 'hidden md:block' class) and either: 1) Move filters to the sidebar menu on mobile, or 2) Add a filter button that opens a modal/drawer with filters
critical_code_review_comments: Line 3327: Filter panel div should have 'hidden md:block' to hide on mobile
Mobile responsiveness implementation is good overall - isMobile detection, mobileView state, bottom navigation all working correctly

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All core mobile features working, one design issue with filter panel

context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Desk mobile responsiveness tested. Working features: 1) Bottom nav bar with Menu/Tickets/Detail/Refresh 2) Sidebar opens via Menu button 3) Ticket detail opens full-screen on mobile 4) Back button returns to list 5) All modals (New Ticket, Delete) are mobile responsive 6) Search works on mobile 7) Reply composer is usable. Issue: Filter panel (w-52) not hidden on mobile causing cramped layout.

mobile_viewport.details: Service Desk loads correctly on 390x844 viewport

bottom_navigation.details: 4 buttons visible: Menu, Tickets (with badge), Detail, Refresh - all functional

sidebar_toggle.details: Menu button opens sidebar, Tickets button closes it

ticket_detail_view.details: Clicking ticket opens full-screen detail view with back button, status dropdown, reply composer

back_button.details: Back button (< arrow) returns to ticket list from detail view

new_ticket_modal.details: Modal opens and fits mobile screen (358px width), all form fields accessible

delete_modal.details: Delete confirmation modal is mobile responsive

reply_composer.details: Rich text editor with formatting options visible and usable on mobile

filter_panel.details: Filter panel (w-52) not hidden on mobile, causing cramped layout
